description: Restructure the building inspection report at /home/ga/Documents/inspection_report.docx into a professional multi-section document. The final document must consist of five distinct sections: a Title Page (Portrait orientation, no header); Executive Summary & Body (Portrait orientation, header: 'ABC Engineering Associates — CONFIDENTIAL'); Appendix A (Landscape orientation, header: 'Appendix A — Floor Plans & Deficiency Matrix'); Appendix B (Landscape orientation, header: 'Appendix B — Cost Estimates'); and Appendix C (Portrait orientation, header: 'Appendix C — Certifications & Qualifications'). Each section must start on a new page with the specified orientation and header content. Save the result to /home/ga/Documents/inspection_report_formatted.docx.
